name: codex-loops
description: Use when a user explicitly asks for Codex Loops or path-first dynamic workflow orchestration through the Elixir scheduler.

interface.shortDescription: Validate and run Codex Loops workflows through the scheduler adapter.
interface.longDescription: Codex Loops packages one opt-in skill plus a source launcher for the Homebrew-installed Elixir runtime. The MCP adapter health-checks or starts the scheduler release, validates workflow files through the scheduler API, and leaves scheduler state inside the Elixir/Phoenix runtime.
defaultPrompt: Turn this task into a Codex Loops workflow file.
Test this workflow script with bounded args first.
Execute this tested Codex Loops workflow.
